task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Emoncms Admin panel to view system information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the Emoncms application, specifically showing the Administration or System Info page with technical specifications visible.

task_completion.description: Agent opens a text editor or terminal to create the required report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open, showing the file path /home/ga/system_audit_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent records the software version fields in the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file contains the keys 'emoncms_version', 'mysql_version', 'php_version', and 'server_os' with corresponding values in 'key: value' format.

task_completion.description: Agent records the system status and count fields in the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file contains the keys 'redis_status', 'feed_count', 'input_count', and 'mqtt_status' with corresponding values in 'key: value' format.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed system audit report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the file is saved (e.g., no unsaved changes asterisk), or a terminal command like 'cat' displays the final file contents.

integrity.description: Agent extracted the information by viewing the Emoncms web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Emoncms Admin panel in a web browser, rather than the agent using terminal commands to query the database or Docker containers directly.

integrity.description: The values recorded in the report match the actual system state shown in the Admin panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values for feed count (6), input count (5), and MQTT status (disabled) in the report match the values visible in the Emoncms Admin panel screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent actively created and populated the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting the extracted information into the text editor or terminal, rather than running a pre-existing script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/system_audit_report.txt. The required fields are: emoncms_version, mysql_version, php_version, redis_status, server_os, feed_count, input_count, mqtt_status. The environment has 6 pre-created feeds and 5 inputs, and MQTT is explicitly disabled. The values in the report must match the values displayed in the Emoncms Admin panel.
